channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

1. As the Iran War Fallout Widens, Trump Seems to Be Turning to an Old Tactic. He’s in for a Rude Awakening.  Yahoo
  2. The Iran war threatens to undermine Trump’s favorite bragging point  CNN
  3. Iran war is one 'TACO' too far  Reuters
  4. Will Trump TACO on Iran?  The New York Times
  5. The thing that everyone expected to happen has happened  Financial Times

item.title: Ex-Starbucks CEO Schultz Moves With Family Office to Miami - Bloomberg
item.description:
1. Ex-Starbucks CEO Schultz Moves With Family Office to Miami  Bloomberg
  2. Exclusive | Ex-Starbucks CEO Howard Schultz Pays $44 Million for Florida Penthouse  WSJ
  3. Howard Schultz to leave Seattle as business community bristles over income tax  KOMO
  4. Seattle billionaire announces move to Miami  The Seattle Times
  5. Former Starbucks CEO Howard Schultz moves to Florida from Washington state  Fox Business

item.title: Ohio treasure hunter released from jail, refused to reveal location of 500 gold coins - WKRC
item.description:
1. Ohio treasure hunter released from jail, refused to reveal location of 500 gold coins  WKRC
  2. Deep-sea treasure hunter freed after decade behind bars for refusing to reveal gold location  Fox News
  3. Treasure hunter who refused to disclose location of shipwreck's 500 gold coins is released from prison after a decade  CBS News
  4. Former Ohio-born treasure hunter released from prison, but 500 gold coins remain unaccounted for  10TV
  5. Ohio treasure hunter Tommy Thompson released from prison, still mum on gold  The Columbus Dispatch
